x-enumeration-literals.name: Policy Eligibility Check
x-enumeration-literals.description: Verifies that the policy under which the claim is made is valid and active.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Coverage Eligibility Check
x-enumeration-literals.description: Confirms that the event type and circumstances are covered under the policy’s terms.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Waiting Period Check
x-enumeration-literals.description: Checks if the required minimum time from policy inception to event has passed.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Claimant / Beneficiary Eligibility Check
x-enumeration-literals.description: Verifies that the person submitting the claim is authorized to do so.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Event Eligibility Check
x-enumeration-literals.description: Confirms the occurrence and timing of the event align with policy coverage period and definitions.
